Chrust
Polish Cracklings

Ingredients:
- 4 egg yolks
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon rum or brandy
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
- 2 cups all-purpose flour
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- Oil for frying
- Powdered sugar for dusting

Instructions:
Beat egg yolks with sugar until pale, about 3-4 minutes.
Add rum and vanilla extract, mix well.
Fold in flour and salt to form soft dough.
Roll out very thin on floured surface, about 1/8 inch thick.
Cut into 2x3 inch rectangles.
Make small slit in center of each piece.
Pull one end through the slit to create twisted shape.
Heat oil to 350°F in deep pot.
Fry 1-2 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy.
Drain on paper towels.
Dust generously with powdered sugar while still warm.

Serving suggestion: Serve as traditional Polish Christmas treat
with coffee or warm milk. Best enjoyed fresh.

Preparation time: 30 minutes
Cooking time: 20 minutes
Serves: 24 pieces
